title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
company: Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates!
